query:
INSERT INTO organizations (clientId, name, slug, contactName, contactEmail, status) VALUES
(1, 'RadOne Test Hospital 1', 'radone-test-1', 'John Doe', 'john@radone-test-1.com', 'active'),
(1, 'RadOne Test Hospital 2', 'radone-test-2', 'Jane Smith', 'jane@radone-test-2.com', 'active'),
(2, 'SRV Test Hospital 1', 'srv-test-1', 'Bob Johnson', 'bob@srv-test-1.com', 'active'),
(2, 'SRV Test Hospital 2', 'srv-test-2', 'Alice Williams', 'alice@srv-test-2.com', 'active')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=name;
